channel.title: 景報 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: AI军事目标锁定与五角大楼之战

item.description: Rising interest rates bring prolonged downturn to the buyout industry

item.title: 乌克兰打响金融前线紧急战役
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 缅甸军政府议会政变后首开议
item.description: Five years after armoured vehicles rolled through the streets of Myanmar’s capital and the generals tore up an election result they did not like, a new parliament sat for the first time on Monday. The

item.title: 裕信银行350亿欧元竞购德商行
item.description: UniCredit SpA made a €35 billion ($40 billion) takeover bid for Commerzbank AG, while saying it doesn’t expect to actually take full control.

item.title: 钢厂日耗130万英镑运营
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标进展艰难
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 以总理对手竞相对伊示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 菲律宾央行出手稳汇率
item.description: The Philippine peso weakened toward the key psychological level of 60 pesos per dollar, prompting the central bank to intervene to support the currency.

item.title: 巴黎左翼分裂或影响市长选情
item.description: Socialist candidate Emmanuel Grégoire surged ahead of former culture minister Rachida Dati in the first round of voting for Paris mayor on Sunday as the left bids to extend its 25 years at the helm. B

item.title: 电力成本高企 南非32关停莫铝厂
item.description: South32 Ltd. idled its Mozambican aluminum smelter, the second biggest in the southern hemisphere, after talks failed to secure an affordable power supply beyond this month.

item.title: 剑桥校长促财政大臣改革学生贷款
item.description: Chris Smith criticises ‘absurd position’ graduates find themselves in and calls for more vocational education

item.title: 散户撤资数十亿，撤离信贷金矿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 企业雇待业青年可获补贴
item.description: Payments of £3,000 for each 18-24 year old given a job are among proposals to tackle youth unemployment being announced later.

item.title: 亚洲央行亮剑，空头当心

item.title: 美国团体如何推动英国反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: 泰执政党掌控国会主席权位
item.description: The role is pivotal in Thailand’s parliamentary system, setting legislative agendas and scheduling key votes for the lower house, including to select the prime minister.

item.title: 泰勒-福斯特谈香港"美丽悖论"

item.title: 乌反对派领袖称逃亡海外保命
item.description: Bobi Wine says from an undisclosed location: "It was clear that the regime wanted to eliminate me."

item.title: 以军称 synagogue袭击者兄弟系真主党指挥官
item.description: US officials previously said the man accused of ramming a truck full of explosives into a synagogue had recently lost family in Lebanon.

item.title: 纸币、河狸与英国抵制潮
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

item.title: AI游戏逻辑缺陷成因探究
item.description: When winning depends on intuiting a mathematical function, AIs come up short.

item.title: 马达加斯加任命反腐主管为新总理
item.description: President announces Mamitiana Rajaonarison as prime minister after Herintsalama Rajaonarivelo was dismissed.

item.title: 拉法口岸关闭，加沙病患陷绝境
item.description: Thousands face worsening illness after closure of key crossing halts medical evacuations.

item.title: 萨科齐再因利比亚献金案受审
item.description: Former French president Nicolas Sarkozy returns to court on Monday to challenge his conviction over allegations he sought campaign funding from Muammar Gaddafi’s Libya for his 2007 election. Sarkozy,

item.title: 阿联酋何以成伊朗袭击目标
item.description: Iran is looking to test a state that has positioned itself as the Gulf's safest bridge between East and West — and the future of the region.

item.title: 实体AI成制造业新优势
item.description: For decades, manufacturers have pursued automation to drive efficiency, reduce costs, and stabilize operations. That approach delivered meaningful gains, but it is no longer enough. Today’s manufactur
